name_cn:
🌷【New】Gucci Horsebit 1955 Small Handbag
Presenting the new Gucci Horsebit 1955 bag, inspired by the brand's equestrian heritage with its double ring and long strip design. This small handbag is crafted from new GG canvas with a unique heat-pressed pattern for a soft and refined touch.
Beige and dark brown GG canvas, soft and refined
Gucci Rosso Ancora leather trim
Light gold-tone hardware
Brown cotton-linen blend lining
Front detail: Horsebit
Handle height: 4cm
Detachable leather shoulder strap (47-55cm)
Bag length: 95-110cm
Flap closure
Weight: approx. 0.45kg
Model: 815206
Dimensions: 22.6(L) x 12.7(W) x 5.6cm(H)
Color: White PVC / Original leather
Italian creation
